rationale: Elec. Code §259.002 governs HOA regulation of political sign displays. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: a property owners' association may not enforce or adopt a restrictive covenant that prohibits a property owner from displaying on the owner's property one or more signs advertising a candidate or measure for an election
_note: Rule text is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no overlap in subject matter.
